conversation.text: how does it actually work technically

At a high level, the agent sits in your WhatsApp and responds to leads instantly. Qualifies them through a natural conversation and books them into your calendar. It's trained specifically on your business so it sounds like your team, not a generic bot
Data's stored in Europe, GDPR compliant. For the specifics on security architecture and retention policies, that's something Louis covers properly on the call
That's a good question, Louis can cover that properly on the call. He deals with the compliance side directly
ok and what CRM do you work with
Most of the main ones, HubSpot, Salesforce, GoHighLevel, Monday and others. If you've got something specific Louis can confirm on the call whether it integrates
Yeah I'd want Louis to confirm that one specifically rather than guessing. That's exactly the kind of thing the call is for
